rationale: Adds a 510-line implementation plan at .cursor/plans/new-map-app.md for a multi-provider MapLibre GL JS POI web map. The document is purely informational/planning: it specifies the tech stack (Vite + React 19 + TypeScript 5.7 + Tailwind v4 + maplibre-gl 5.24 + react-map-gl/maplibre 8.1 + TanStack Query 5 + Node 22 + Fastify + Postgres 16/PostGIS 3.4), a 10-phase implementation roadmap from Phase 0 (scaffold) through Phase 9 (production hardening), provider registry (DEFAULT_PROVIDER_ID = 'openfreemap-liberty', plus Stadia, CARTO, Stamen, Thunderforest as paid/premium), a project folder structure, an ASCII architecture diagram, a provider reference table with URLs and limits, and a key security model (e.g. Thunderforest key delivered via authenticated /providers/thunderforest/credentials endpoint, never bundled). Sections about migration SQL (CREATE TABLE pois ... geom geography(POINT, 4326)), PostGIS GIST indexes, and ST_AsGeoJSON usage are documented as future work. No code is added; matches the PR title exactly.
